name: BALMUDA Inc.
summary: Balmuda Inc. engages in the design, development, manufacturing, marketing, and sale of home appliances in Japan and internationally. The company offers steam toasters, electric kettles, electric rice cookers, and microwave ovens; fans, portable circulator fans, air cleaners, and humidifiers; portable LED lanterns, solar LED desk lights, and LED desk light; wireless speakers and hover cleaners; notebook cooling stands; and consumables/parts, such as filter, battery, etc. It also offers curry sauces and a collection recipes. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Tokyo, japan.
